2603.22790.title: Quantum Random Forest for the Regression Problem
2603.22790.paper_summary: The Random Forest model is one of the popular models of Machine learning. We present a quantum algorithm for testing (forecasting) process of the Random Forest machine learning model for the Regression problem. The presented algorithm is more efficient (in terms of query complexity or running time) than the classical counterpart.
2603.22790.paper_summary_zh: 隨機森林模型是機器學習中流行的模型之一。<lb/>我們提出了一種量子算法，用於測試（預測）隨機森林機器學習模型在回歸問題上的過程。<lb/>所提出的算法在查詢複雜度或運行時間方面比經典對應算法更有效。
2603.22790.author: Kamil Khadiev et.al.
